summary: The diff shows CategoryPage.tsx has been refactored to implement the requirements. The truncated diff shows removal of the buffering pattern refs, introduction of processedPagesRef, minDurationTimerRef, and immediate product appending logic. Most requirements appear implemented based on the visible code, but some acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure stable product keys in ProductGrid (keyed by barcode) — REQ-4 AC requires ProductGrid renders each product with a stable key based on its barcode
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show any changes to ProductGrid component. The truncated CategoryPage.tsx does not show the JSX render section where ProductGrid is used with keys. Without seeing the ProductGrid component diff or the render section of CategoryPage, it cannot be confirmed that stable barcode-based keys are being passed.
